summary: The diff addresses all four requirements (REQ-59 through REQ-63) to varying degrees. REQ-59 is partially implemented — the backend/main.mo still contains AccessControl imports, admin/user authorization guards on profile functions, and the truncated diff shows authorization checks remaining. REQ-60, REQ-61, REQ-62, and REQ-63 appear largely implemented in the frontend hooks and components, but several specific functions are missing proper handling due to truncation. Key concerns: backend still has AccessControl infrastructure and guards on non-mutating functions; deleteManuscript returns bare unit not a Result type; updateFamilyHistory mutation does not check ok/err variant.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove every admin-only and user-only authorization guard from all mutating functions. No function may reject a call based on caller principal or role.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo still imports and uses AccessControl, MixinAuthorization, and contains Runtime.trap('Unauthorized') guards in getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, and saveCallerUserProfile. The truncated diff does not confirm all listed mutating functions are free of authorization checks.

missing_requirements.requirement: deleteManuscript must return an explicit Result<T, Text> or typed variant (#ok(T)/#err(Text)).
missing_requirements.reason: In the diff, deleteManuscript is shown returning async () (bare unit), not a Result type. The frontend hook for useDeleteManuscript also does not check #ok/#err, consistent with a bare return.

missing_requirements.requirement: updateFamilyHistory must return an explicit Result<T, Text> or typed variant.
missing_requirements.reason: The useUpdateFamilyHistory mutation in useQueries.ts calls actor.updateFamilyHistory(content) and simply awaits it without checking #ok/#err, implying the backend returns a bare value rather than a Result variant.

missing_requirements.requirement: useDeleteManuscript mutationFn must await the actor call, check for the #ok arm, and throw on #err.
missing_requirements.reason: useDeleteManuscript's mutationFn only awaits actor.deleteManuscript(id) without checking any #ok/#err variant, meaning it does not handle the Result pattern as required.

missing_requirements.requirement: useUpdateFamilyHistory mutationFn must await the actor call, check for the #ok arm, and throw on #err.
missing_requirements.reason: useUpdateFamilyHistory's mutationFn calls await actor.updateFamilyHistory(content) without checking #ok/#err variant or throwing on #err.

hallucinated_features.description: useGetAdminNotes hook imported and used in ContactClan.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-63 specifies a useAddHelpRequestNote mutation and displaying adminNote per help request row, but does not specify a separate useGetAdminNotes hook. This hook appears to have been added beyond what was requested.
